description_long: This is a compact submachine gun-style rifle with a predominantly black finish accented by a striking red, crackled pattern across its entire body. The weapon features a cylindrical barrel with multiple circular vents near the muzzle, likely for heat dissipation, and a prominent front sight post. The magazine is a long, rectangular, detachable box type, inserted vertically into the lower receiver. The grip is ergonomically shaped and covered in the same black and red pattern, matching the rest of the firearm. The overall design is modern and tactical, with visible charging handle and trigger components, making it suitable for close-quarters urban environments.
description: A compact, black and red crackle-patterned submachine gun with a vented barrel, long box magazine, and ergonomic grip. Modern, tactical design suited for urban use.
description_view_0: The rear of the rifle is visible, showing the back of the receiver, the top-mounted charging handle, and the rear sight alignment.
description_view_1: The left side of the rifle is shown, highlighting the vented barrel, long box magazine, and the full extent of the red crackle pattern.
description_view_2: The front of the rifle is visible, focusing on the muzzle with its circular vents and the front sight post.
description_view_3: The right side of the rifle is shown, displaying the magazine, grip, and the detailed crackle pattern along the receiver and stock area.
